$2 [um 11 momv m msnm mm :1 11mm Gononm-qns—s nouns—11 Law (a) mama—e anal—mun Ammovzuxa D}p11{j}021122109 2213 MM 66/100891 '(1 'ON ‘CDEIH Emcee—gm «gram -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OEJNDIA : EXFRAORPlI‘LAflRYi># [PART H—SFXL 3(ii)] L,__':#u=l__# MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES (BMSeetion) NOTIFICATION New Delhi. the 23rd November, 2005 . 5.0. 1637 ).—-Whereas Sub-section (l) of Section 9A of Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956) (herein referred-t as the said Act) provides that the Central Government shall maintain a data bank and information system at the national 1 el for each river basin which shall include data regarding water resources, land, agriculture and matters relating thereto, the Central Government may prescribe from time to time. , And wher as Sub-section (l) of Section 9A of the said Act provides that the State Government shall supply the data to the Central vernment or to an agency appointed by the Central Government for the purpose, as and when required, And wher 5 Central Water Commission (CWC) constituted under the then Ministry of Irrigation (presently the Ministry of Wat r Resources) is maintaining basin-wise information on water resources, agricultural statistics about land use (State—wise) irrigation potential, water pricing, etc. based on the information collected by the Information System Organisation of he CWC; s the Central Government, keeping in flew the functions performed by the CWC, considers it necessary to appoint the WC as an agency to collect all data and information relating to river basin(s) supplied by the State And now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Subsection (1) of Section 9A of the Inter-State River WaterDisputes ct, 1956, the Central Government hereby appoints CWC as an agency for maintaining the data bank and information sys m for each river basin which shall include data regarding water resources, land, agriculture and matters relating thereto in such form and manner as may required from time to time by the CWC to be made available by the respective State Governments; _ And, also or the purposes of Sub-section (2) of Section 9A of the said Act, the Central Government hereby appoints the CWC whic may verify the data supplied by the State Government and for this purpose the CWC may authorise any concerned Stat Governments as are considered necessary to discharge their function. officer ofthe C?tral Govemment or the CWC including retired officers to examine such records and information from the l Printed by the Manager, Govt [No SIZZOOS-BMI lNDRA RAJ, Commissioner (Projects) of india Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri.
